prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年最低位次分别为 359→374→356→364→360 名，整体在 355–375 名区间窄幅波动，近 5 年极差仅 18 名，走势极为平稳；2025 年基准位次约 360 名；2021–2025 年本省理科/物理类招生计划均为 33 人，2026 年计划增至 40 人，扩招约 21.2%，为近 6 年首次显著扩招，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985/211/双一流，软科中国大学排名连续 6 年稳居第 7 名（2021–2026），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2025 年高考周期声誉偏正面（李政道先生逝世与少年班关联，提升学校形象）；2026 年周期出现偏负面事件（教授因贪污助学生入读被判刑），但整体关注度有限；抖音热度总排名第 12（高热），反映短视频平台曝光度高；2021–2025 年均无投档断档或暴跌记录，录取稳定性强；第五轮学科评估中，数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等 8 个学科获 A+，材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、管理科学与工程、工商管理 4 个学科获 A，统计学、力学、仪器科学与技术等 7 个学科获 A-，A- 及以上共 19 个学科，基础理学与前沿工科实力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等专业社会热度持续高热/推荐，与中科大优势学科高度契合；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，竞争加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 394 分、特殊类型招生控制线 473 分，近年波动不大；中科大位于安徽合肥，非本省高校，陕西考生报考需考虑跨省地域偏好；该校在本省招生计划占比较小（33–40 人），对整体录取位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅波动（355–375 名）、2026 年扩招约 21.2%（从 33 人增至 40 人）缓解竞争、本省物理类考生增加约 19.7% 加剧竞争、学校顶尖层次与高热抖音关注度维持报考热度，供需两端力量基本抵消；预测 2026 年最低位次约406名，区间365–447名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（数学类+物理学类）
- 工科试验班（科技英才班）（计算机类+电子信息类）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、自动化、人工智能等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、天文学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 经济管理试验班（管理科学、金融学、统计学）
- 材料类（材料物理、材料化学、高分子材料与工程）
- 环境科学与工程类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 365–447 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档顶尖英才班作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 365 名以内）可重点冲击一档拔尖计划科技英才班；位次接近区间上限（如 447 名附近）应以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 359→374→356→364→360, fluctuating narrowly within the 355–375 range, with a range of only 18 over the past 5 years, showing extremely stable trends; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 360; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 33 students each year, and in 2026 the plan increases to 40 students, an expansion of about 21.2%, the first significant expansion in nearly 6 years, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 7th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for 6 consecutive years (2021–2026), belonging to the top-tier national universities, strongly attractive to high-scoring students; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation was slightly positive (the death of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee and its association with the Special Class for the Gifted Young enhanced the school's image); during the 2026 cycle, a slightly negative event occurred (a professor was sentenced for corruption related to student admission), but overall attention was limited; Douyin popularity ranked 12th overall (high heat), reflecting high exposure on short video platforms; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops, indicating strong admission stability; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 8 disciplines including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering received A+, 4 disciplines including Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering, and Business Administration received A, and 7 disciplines including Statistics, Mechanics, and Instrument Science and Technology received A-, totaling 19 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding strength in basic sciences and cutting-edge engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Mathematics/Statistics continue to be highly popular/recommended in society, closely aligning with USTC's advantageous disciplines; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; in 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch score was 394, and the special type enrollment control line was 473, with little fluctuation in recent years; USTC is located in Hefei, Anhui, not a provincial university, so Shaanxi candidates need to consider cross-provincial regional preferences; the school's enrollment plan in this province is relatively small (33–40 students), having limited impact on overall admission rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings (355–375), the 2026 expansion of about 21.2% (from 33 to 40 students) easing competition, the increase of about 19.7% in provincial physics examinees intensifying competition, and the top-tier school level and high Douyin attention maintaining application heat, supply and demand forces largely offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 406, with a range of 365–447.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) (Mathematics + Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Technology Elite Class) (Computer Science + Electronic Information)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Physics (Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Management Science, Finance, Statistics)
- Materials (Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 365–447, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 top elite classes as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 365), focus on applying for Tier 1 Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Classes; if the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 447), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
